settings.title: Spring Clean Week Is Back This April
settings.excerpt: For one week we add a deep task to every regular clean at no extra charge, from windows to the inside of the fridge.
settings.body:
There is a reason spring cleaning is a tradition. After a shut-up winter, homes need an airing and a proper going-over, and the lighter mornings make the dust suddenly impossible to ignore.

So for one week in April, every regular Sparkhaus clean comes with one deep-clean task added free. Pick from interior windows, the inside of the fridge, the oven, or a full skirting-and-doorframe job. These are the jobs that get skipped in a weekly clean simply because they take longer than the time allows.

Choose your free task

  • Interior windows, glasses and frames
  • The inside of the fridge, shelves and seals
  • The oven, racks and door glass
  • A full skirting-board and doorframe wipe-down

Just tell your team which task you would like when they arrive. One household per booking, one task each. It helps us if you decide before the visit, so the team can carry the right kit and set aside the extra time.

A small suggestion: the fridge is the one most people put off the longest and notice the most afterwards. If you cannot decide, that is the one we would pick. The oven is the close runner-up, and the one that makes the biggest difference to how the kitchen smells.

It is our small way of helping you shake off winter without the full price of a deep clean. There is no catch and nothing to opt into beyond telling us which task you fancy.
